The two-time defending Grey Cup champion Blue Bombers look to go 4-0 while the 1-1 Argos try to bounce back from an ugly road loss last week.

HAVE YOUR SAY: Answer our daily Toronto Sun poll question
JIVANI: 'Defund the police' rally cry a scam   “Defund the police” is, and always has been, a scam.

Canada to fight poor diet with labels for sugar, salt, saturated fat   OTTAWA — Foods high in sugars, sodium and saturated fat will come with clear warning labels in Canada starting in 2026, the federal government said on Thursday, in an effort to promote healthier eating choices and reduce chronic health risks.

Rihanna’s Fenty Beauty out to prove Africa is viable market   Rihanna, whose full name is Robyn Rihanna Fenty, redefined the cosmetics industry when the line debuted in 2017 with 40 shades of foundation.

SUNshine Girl Meg   SUNshine Girl Meg loves to vacation at the beach — any beach. The 5-foot Taurus, who first posed for us in October 2018, also loves ballet and dancing to hip-hop. (Ernest Doroszuk/Toronto Sun)

SUNshine Girl Marijana   SUNshine Girl Marijana is back to spice it up! The Red Hot Chili Peppers fan enjoys travelling, shopping, swimming and watching movies, while her dream car is a white BMW. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)

SUNshine Girl Chantelle   Here’s another shot of SUNshine Girl Chantelle. Our 5-foot-5, blue-eyed Sagittarius, who is back from her 2019 shoot, is into bartending and dreams of being a model. (Toronto Sun)
SUNshine Girl Larissa   SUNshine Girl Larissa, our fit, 5-foot, brown-eyed Virgo, loves bodybuilding and spending time at the gym. (Stan Behal/Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)

SUNshine Girl Nikki   SUNshine Girl Nikki is a dog groomer who likes hockey. Her favourite movie is "The Fast and the Furious" and her dream car is a 1970 Oldsmobile 442 W-30. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)
